basic_details.job_title: Latehar district Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Medical Officer and AYUSH Doctor Posts
basic_details.short_information: Latehar District has released the official Medical Officer (MBBS) and AYUSH Doctor Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced for Medical Officer (MBBS) and AYUSH Doctor posts on a contractual basis. Eligible candidates with MBBS or a Bachelor's degree in Ayurveda, Homoeopathy, or Unani along with working knowledge of computers can attend the walk-in interview on 25 July 2026. The maximum age limit is 70 years for MBBS Medical Officers and 60 years for AYUSH Doctors. The official notification PDF and walkin interview details are provided below.

content_sections.heading: Latehar district Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Latehar district Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Latehar district Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Latehar district Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Officer (MBBS): MBBS AYUSH Doctor: Bachelor in Ayurved/ Homoeopath/ Unani with working knowledge of Computer

content_sections.heading: Latehar district Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: MBBS: Maximum 70 years Ayush Physician: Maximum 60 years

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Latehar district recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Latehar district recruitment is scheduled for 25 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Medical Officer (MBBS) and AYUSH Doctor in the Latehar district.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required for the Medical Officer (MBBS) post is an MBBS degree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the AYUSH Doctor position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the AYUSH Doctor position is 20000/-.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Medical Officer (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer (MBBS) post is 70 years.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Latehar district office.
